name: Klotho plasmid gene-therapy registry
summary: Recruiting single-group phase 1 ClinicalTrials.gov study of injectable plasmid-delivered klotho gene therapy in healthy adult and older adult volunteers, with biomarker, safety, cognitive, quality-of-life, epigenetic-age, and brain-age endpoints but no posted results.

trial_details.expected_results_window: No completion date is recorded locally; no near-term result expectation should be assumed.
trial_details.horizon_note: No posted results are represented locally, so surveillance should watch for registry results or linked publications.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Neuroendocrine and Systemic Signal Reset because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, safety, and function in Healthy volunteers aged 23 to 90 years. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
